EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Enum esriGeometryError

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Describes why a parameter to a method is incorrect, or why a method could not be completed.

[Guid("84485021-9284-11D1-B987-080009EE4E51")]
public enum esriGeometryError

Fields

E_GEOMETRY_AMBIGUOUSPARTTYPE = 32588

32588: (0x80047F4c) The operation would result in the creation of a new part, but the type of part to be created was ambiguous.

E_GEOMETRY_AUTHORITY_TOO_LONG = 32620

32620: (0x80047F6c) The authority parameter is too long.

E_GEOMETRY_BADRELATION = 32562

32562: (0x80047F32) The Relate operator couldn't evalute the specified relation expression.

E_GEOMETRY_BAD_SPLIT_DISTANCE = 32540

32540: (0x80047F1c) The specified splitting distance is not included in the curve to be split.

E_GEOMETRY_BEZIER_EXTEND_EMBEDDED = 32579

32579: (0x80047F43) ExtendEmbedded not implemented for Bezier curves.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFERCONSTRUCTION_INUSE = 32614

32614: (0x80047F66) A client has attempted to re-enter a BufferConstruction object while its ConstructBuffers... operation method executing.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFERFAILURE = 32615

32615: (0x80047F67) An error occurred during the buffer operation.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFEROUTOFBOUNDS = 32571

32571: (0x80047F3b) The buffer coordinates are out of bounds.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFER_DISTANCES = 32610

32610: (0x80047F62) There was a problem obtaining a distance at which to buffer a geometry.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFER_DISTANCE_ZERO = 32638

32638: (0x80047F7e) Cannot buffer a geometry with a distance of zero.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFER_INVALID_BUFFER_DISTANCE = 32619

32619: (0x80047F6b) The buffer distance must be a valid floating point number.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFER_INVALID_END_OPTION = 32618

32618: (0x80047F6a) The end option used by the BufferConstruction service must be one of: esriBufferFlat, esriBufferRound.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFER_INVALID_SIDE_OPTION = 32617

32617: (0x80047F69) The side option used by the BufferConstruction service must be one of: esriBufferLeft, esriBufferRight, esriBufferFull.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFER_INVOLVES_BOTH_POLES = 32632

32632: (0x80047F78) A buffer cannot currently cover both poles.

E_GEOMETRY_BUFFER_NEGATIVE_DISTANCE = 32636

32636: (0x80047F7c) Cannot buffer points or polyines by a negative distance.

E_GEOMETRY_CANNOT_DO_3D_OPERATIONS_ON_CURVES = 32626

32626: (0x80047F72) Cannot do 3D operations on curve segments.

E_GEOMETRY_CANNOT_EXTRAPOLATE_BY_SEGMENT = 32607

32607: (0x80047F5f) No segment available to determine extrapolation ratio.

E_GEOMETRY_CANT_CUT_POLYGON = 32561

32561: (0x80047F31) A cut operation could not classify all parts of the polygon as being left or right of the cutting polyline.

E_GEOMETRY_CANT_EVALUATE_RELATION_MATRIX = 32628

32628: (0x80047F74) Some combinations of geometries with vertical segments cannot be evaluated with a 9DEM relational expression.

E_GEOMETRY_CANT_QUERY_ON_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTES = 32549

32549: (0x80047F25) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_CANT_RESHAPE = 32542

32542: (0x80047F1e) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_CONSTRUCTPOINTUNION = 32578

32578: (0x80047F42) Can't use ConstructUnion on a point.

E_GEOMETRY_DEGENERATEGEOMETRY = 32595

32595: (0x80047F53) The operation could not be performed because the geometry is degenerate.

E_GEOMETRY_DUPLICATESEGMENTPOINTER = 32597

32597: (0x80047F55) The same segment has been added to the geometry more than once.

E_GEOMETRY_EDITED_REGIONS_OVERLAP = 32605

32605: (0x80047F5d) Cannot merge the two geometries. The edited regions overlap.

E_GEOMETRY_EDITS_OVERLAP = 32608

32608: (0x80047F60) Cannot merge the two geometries. The edits overlap.

E_GEOMETRY_EMPTYGEOMETRY = 32514

32514: (0x80047F02) An operation on an empty geometry was attempted - for example, trying to move or rotate one.

E_GEOMETRY_EQUAL_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTES = 32547

32547: (0x80047F23) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_EXTERIORPART = 32591

32591: (0x80047F4f) An interior part must be specified.

E_GEOMETRY_FILLET_FAILED = 32559

32559: (0x80047F2f) The fillet could not be constructed according to specs.

E_GEOMETRY_GEODESIC_BUFFER_COORD_OUT_OF_RANGE = 32633

32633: (0x80047F79) The input was outside a +-360 longitude range or outside +-90 latitude.

E_GEOMETRY_HAS_NL_SEGMENTS = 32563

32563: (0x80047F33) A geometry being exported to an Esri shapefile buffer contains non-linear segments. Some data sources cannot store non linear segments.

E_GEOMETRY_ILLEGALWIN32EXPORT = 32577

32577: (0x80047F41) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_INCONSISTANT_DIMENSIONS = 32553

32553: (0x80047F29) Input geometries do not have same dimensions.

E_GEOMETRY_INCONSISTANT_PARAMS = 32515

32515: (0x80047F03) The input parameters could not be reasonably interpreted - for example, asking for the 2d result of a polyline/polygon intersection.

E_GEOMETRY_INCONSISTANT_SPATIAL_REFERENCE = 32533

32533: (0x80047F15) Input geometries do not have same spatial reference.

E_GEOMETRY_INPUT_TYPE_INCORRECT = 32604

32604: (0x80047F5c) The geometries must be polylines or polygons.

E_GEOMETRY_INPUT_TYPE_MISMATCH = 32603

32603: (0x80047F5b) The geometries are not all of the same type.

E_GEOMETRY_INSUFFICIENT_CONTROLPOINTS = 32598

32598: (0x80047F56) The number of control points is insufficient.

E_GEOMETRY_INTERIORPART = 32537

32537: (0x80047F19) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_INTERNALERROR = 32569

32569: (0x80047F39) An internal error has occurred in the geometry system.

E_GEOMETRY_INVALIDCONSTRUCTION = 32582

32582: (0x80047F46) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_INVALIDCOUNT = 32590

32590: (0x80047F4e) The number of items specified is too high or too low in the given context.

E_GEOMETRY_INVALIDRINGORDER = 32589

32589: (0x80047F4d) The ordering of rings and types is invalid. (For example, an inner ring may not have an outer ring.)

E_GEOMETRY_INVALIDRINGTYPE = 32587

32587: (0x80047F4b) The given ring is not of the required type within the multipatch. (For example an inner ring may be used where an outer ring is required.)

E_GEOMETRY_INVALIDTRIANGLESTYPE = 32639

32639: (0x80047F7f) Triangles part of a multipatch is invalid (For example triangles part must have number of vertices divisible by 3).

E_GEOMETRY_INVALID_ANGLE = 32525

32525: (0x80047F0d) An arc construction operation was given an invalid angle.

E_GEOMETRY_INVALID_AXES = 32560

32560: (0x80047F30) An elliptic arc construction operation was given invalid axes.

E_GEOMETRY_INVALID_CHORD = 32517

32517: (0x80047F05) An arc construction operation was given an invalid chord distance.

E_GEOMETRY_INVALID_RADIUS = 32516

32516: (0x80047F04) An arc construction operation was given an invalid radius.

E_GEOMETRY_JSON_BAD_SHORTFORM_POINTS = 32637

32637: (0x80047F7d) Cannot create points from short-form point array.

E_GEOMETRY_JSON_SYNTAX = 32635

32635: (0x80047F7b) Syntax error in JSON geometry representation.

E_GEOMETRY_M_OUT_OF_BOUNDS = 32625

32625: (0x80047F71) The m coordinates of this geometry are out of bounds.

E_GEOMETRY_NONENVELOPE = 32518

32518: (0x80047F06) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_NONGEOMETRY = 32545

32545: (0x80047F21) Something other than a geometry was encountered.

E_GEOMETRY_NONMULTIPATCH = 32585

32585: (0x80047F49) Something other than a multipatch was encountered.

E_GEOMETRY_NONPART = 32519

32519: (0x80047F07) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_NONPATH = 32526

32526: (0x80047F0e) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_NONPOINT = 32528

32528: (0x80047F10) Something other than a point was added to a multipoint.

E_GEOMETRY_NONPOLYGON = 32543

32543: (0x80047F1f) Something other than a polygon was encountered.

E_GEOMETRY_NONPOLYLINE = 32544

32544: (0x80047F20) Something other than a polyline was encountered.

E_GEOMETRY_NONSEGMENT = 32527

32527: (0x80047F0f) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_NONTRIANGLEFAN = 32593

32593: (0x80047F51) The input interface does not belong to a triangle fan object.

E_GEOMETRY_NONTRIANGLESTRIP = 32592

32592: (0x80047F50) The input interface does not belong to a triangle strip object.

E_GEOMETRY_NONVECTOR3D = 32594

32594: (0x80047F52) The input interface does not belong to a 3-dimensional vector.

E_GEOMETRY_NOPENDINGMOVETO = 32575

32575: (0x80047F3f) The SegmentGraphCursor has no unfinished MoveTo operation.

E_GEOMETRY_NOTSIMPLE = 32536

32536: (0x80047F18) The operation cannot be performed on a non-simple geometry.

E_GEOMETRY_NOT_BEZIERCURVES = 32599

32599: (0x80047F57) The participating segments must be Bezier curves.

E_GEOMETRY_NOT_ID_AWARE = 32576

32576: (0x80047F40) The geometry is not ID-aware.

E_GEOMETRY_NOT_M_AWARE = 32565

32565: (0x80047F35) The geometry is not M-aware.

E_GEOMETRY_NOT_M_SIMPLE = 32581

32581: (0x80047F45) The geometry has undefined M values for some of its vertices.

E_GEOMETRY_NOT_SINGLEPART = 32627

32627: (0x80047F73) The reshaping polyline must have one part.

E_GEOMETRY_NOT_Z_AWARE = 32564

32564: (0x80047F34) The geometry is not Z-aware.

E_GEOMETRY_NOT_Z_SIMPLE = 32580

32580: (0x80047F44) The geometry has undefined Z values for some of its vertices.

E_GEOMETRY_NO_CURVES_IN_JSON = 32634

32634: (0x80047F7a) Cannot convert polylines or polygons with curves to JSON format.

E_GEOMETRY_NO_VALID_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTES = 32550

32550: (0x80047F26) Not used.

E_GEOMETRY_NULL = 32541

32541: (0x80047F1d) A null geometry does not correspond to any Esri geometry type.

E_GEOMETRY_OPERATION_CANCELLED = 32611

32611: (0x80047F63) The geometry operation was cancelled.

E_GEOMETRY_OUTOFMEMORY = 32572

32572: (0x80047F3c) There is not enough memory.

E_GEOMETRY_OUT_OF_BOUNDS = 32568

32568: (0x80047F38) The coordinates of this geometry are out of bounds.

E_GEOMETRY_PARAMETER_TOO_SMALL = 32622

32622: (0x80047F6e) An input parameter is too small.

E_GEOMETRY_PARTNOTFOUND = 32535

32535: (0x80047F17) The part could not be found in the geometry.

E_GEOMETRY_PART_ZS_ARE_NAN = 32606

32606: (0x80047F5e) A polygon part has no defined zs.

E_GEOMETRY_PROJECTDATUM = 32558

32558: (0x80047F2e) The project method cannot do a datum transformation directly on segments.

E_GEOMETRY_RELATIONSYNTAXERROR = 32573

32573: (0x80047F3d) The relation expression string has a syntax error.

E_GEOMETRY_ROTATEENVELOPE = 32520

32520: (0x80047F08) Envelopes cannot be rotated.

E_GEOMETRY_SEGMENTGRAPH_CANTLOAD = 32566

32566: (0x80047F36) A SegmentGraph can only organize polyline and polygon objects.

E_GEOMETRY_SEGMENTGRAPH_CONSTRUCTERROR = 32567

32567: (0x80047F37) The geometries could not be topologically structured.

E_GEOMETRY_SIMPLIFYFAILED = 32556

32556: (0x80047F2c) Something went wrong in Polygon/Polyline simplification.

E_GEOMETRY_SR_M_MISMATCH = 32602

32602: (0x80047F5a) The geometry is m-aware, but its spatial reference has no m domain or resolution defined.

E_GEOMETRY_SR_Z_MISMATCH = 32601

32601: (0x80047F59) The geometry is z-aware, but its spatial reference has no z domain or resolution defined.

E_GEOMETRY_TOLERANCE_TOO_LARGE_FOR_EXTENT = 32616

32616: (0x80047F68) The xy cluster tolerance was too large for the extent of the data.

E_GEOMETRY_TOOMANYPOINTS = 32570

32570: (0x80047F3a) This operation produced too many points.

E_GEOMETRY_TRANSFORMATION_UNDEFINED = 32600

32600: (0x80047F58) The transformation is undefined.

E_GEOMETRY_TRANSFORMENVELOPE = 32521

32521: (0x80047F09) Envelopes cannot have arbitrary transformations applied to them.

E_GEOMETRY_UNDEFINEDRING = 32586

32586: (0x80047F4a) The multipatch contains a ring that is invalid or has an undefined type.

E_GEOMETRY_UNDEFINED_SPATIAL_REFERENCE = 32551

32551: (0x80047F27) The operation requires the presence of a spatial reference.

E_GEOMETRY_UNDERCONSTRAINED = 32524

32524: (0x80047F0c) The parameters to a geometric construction did not provide enough information to complete the construction.

E_GEOMETRY_UNIT_CONVERSION = 32609

32609: (0x80047F61) Cannot convert between linear and angular units.

E_GEOMETRY_UNKNOWNERROR = 32574

32574: (0x80047F3e) An unknown error has occurred in the geometry system.

E_GEOMETRY_UNKNOWNTYPE = 32523

32523: (0x80047F0b) The GeometryEnvironment did not know how to create a geometry of the specified type.

E_GEOMETRY_WKT_TOO_LONG = 32621

32621: (0x80047F6d) The WKT(Z) parameter is too long.

E_GEOMETRY_WRONGTYPE = 32522

32522: (0x80047F0a) The geometry parameter was of the wrong type for the method.

E_GEOMETRY_WRONG_RELATION_AND_TYPE = 32613

32613: (0x80047F65) The specified combination of relation and geometry types is not valid.

E_GEOMETRY_ZM_OUT_OF_BOUNDS = 32623

32623: (0x80047F6f) The z or m coordinates of this geometry are out of bounds.

E_GEOMETRY_Z_OUT_OF_BOUNDS = 32624

32624: (0x80047F70) The z coordinates of this geometry are out of bounds.
